general_feedback: The added @return descriptions are accurate, clear, and consistent. Each one correctly describes the returned adapter class and the method it exposes, matching the actual return types (e.g., `AsJava[ju.Iterator[A]]` exposes `asJava` returning a Java `Iterator`; `AsJavaCollection[A]` exposes `asJavaCollection`; `AsJavaDictionary` exposes `asJavaDictionary`; the `Properties` converter correctly mentions `Map[String, String]`). Wording style matches the existing @param/@tparam style (lowercase start, backtick-quoted code references) and is consistent across all 24 converters.
